title: the Recirc Return should be at the same horizontal px height as the output from the Main/Basement, so it makes a straight line from the tee to the vertical turn up towards the Heat Pump Water Heater
rename preheat target slider to preheat tank target
show BTUs and BTU/h
description: Incorporate some way to show the available BTU/H at each heating step, and the available stored BTUs in the tanks, and then show the BTU/h of the current output demand, to help the user visually understand at a glance how as more BTUs/h are requested that will be drained from the system over time.

title: rotate mixing valve, align tanks
description: rearrange the mixing valve so it's on the right side, simplifying the water flow from left to right.  Cold-in should enter the pre heat tank on its bottom left.  The 80g water heater should sit at the same level and size to the right of the preheat tank.  The tankless should sit at the same center-line as those two tanks, next in line to the right.  The mixing valve should turn sideways, with the cold/hot on its left and the mixed output on its right.  The mixed output should turn down after a very short few-px into a tee (just enough to visually clear the valve) then split into the loops back to the two pumps.

title: set the default for the preheat target to 104F
make the link to the source repository slightly more prominent, similar font size to the headers for Energy Balanche or Real Time Output
separately show a sum of the tanked BTU/h, so its clear if that value is above or below the current output demand BTU/h
show BTU/time
description: in the energy balance (BTU) panel, for the stored heats, also show the current time this thermal energy can provide at the current output demand

title: crosslink
description: create a link from the simulation back to the repository where it is stored, at the bottom of the page.
